title: micromeria lanata
intro: Micromeria lanata, also known as woolly mint or white thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Micromeria lanata include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Micromeria lanata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural preservative.
